title: Foundational Concepts of Group Theory
description: A visual hierarchy showing the building blocks of group theory, from basic algebraic structures leading up to the definition of a group.
relationships: A Set with a Binary Operation forms a Magma
A Magma with Associativity forms a Semigroup
A Semigroup with an Identity Element forms a Monoid
A Monoid where every element has an Inverse Element forms a Group
